title: OmniRoute i18n config
description: Canonical list of locales used by both the UI (next-intl) and the docs translation pipeline.

default.description: Default fallback locale code (must exist in `locales`).

rtl.description: Locale codes that should be rendered right-to-left.

uiOnly.description: Locale codes shipped in the UI but not produced as a docs translation target.

docsExcluded.description: Locale codes that should NOT receive docs translations (e.g. the source language).

code.description: Locale code (ISO-639-1, optionally with region — e.g. `pt-BR`).

label.description: Short uppercase label for compact UI badges.

name.description: Display name in the locale's native script (kept for compatibility with existing LanguageSelector).

native.description: Same as `name` — present as an alias so new code can rely on a stable field name.

english.description: English name of the language (used by the docs translator system prompt).

flag.description: Flag emoji shown next to the locale.
